segments.text: You think that their design is random,
but it's not. Each of the design is very
carefully chosen for you. It is designed
to keep you happy and safe. Let's see
how. Simple straight lines work great
for the small places like McDonald's.
Fast, efficient, and everybody is happy.
But in theme parks, straight line look
endless and people get [music] angry. So
Disney made snake lines. Same wait time,
but your brain think you're moving
faster. But when thousands of people
arrive together, even the snake lines
create chaos. So, airports use funnels,
wide entrance, narrow checkpoint. So, no
pushing and everybody stays calm. But
what about 80,000 people leaving a
stadium at the same time? These big
stadiums are designed to release people
in waves. You think you choose when you
leave, but you're being controlled. It's
brilliant design. Subscribe for more
amazing design content.
